title: Neznámý titulek
content: PGF World Season 9 has now come to an end after 5 weeks of nonstop action, culminating in the playoffs on April 8th, 2026. There were plenty of surprises throughout the season and they didn’t stop coming on the final day either, as the top-seeded competitors didn’t actually end up winning. In between rounds of the tournament, the PGF also staged their customary Battlerama tournament featuring four competitors who organizers wanted to see more of after the regular season alongside their first ever ‘Princess of the PGF’ tournament. Although the playoffs were undoubtedly the main event, both of these produced some highlights too. Jeo Ortiz won the Battlerama by beating CJ Murdock in EBI Overtime after a brutally long match and submitting Clayton Wimer with a heel hook, while Violet Goodnight became the first ever Princess of the PGF by displaying some really impressive Jiu-Jitsu for someone so young. Jett Thompson was the top seed in the playoffs and he delivered on that promise initially by beating Shawn Melanson in EBI Overtime and finishing Austin Oranday, but it wasn’t his night in the end. Kevin Beuhring stormed through the other side of the bracket with a rear-naked choke against Chuy Magana and a lovely counter heel hook against Elijah Carlton, before getting the upset against Thompson with a choke in the first round of overtime in the final. PGF World Season 9 Playoffs Full Results Playoffs Opening Round Jett Thompson defeats Shawn Melanson via Submission – Rear-naked Choke in EBI Overtime Austin Oranday defeats Travis Haven via Submission – Ankle-lock Elijah Carlton defeats Jayden Groner via Submission – Heel Hook Kevin Beuhring defeats Chuy Magana via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Semi-Finals Jett Thompson defeats Austin Oranday via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Kevin Beuhring defeats Elijah Carlton via Submission – Ankle-lock Final Kevin Beuhring defeats Jett Thompson via Submission – Rear-naked Choke in EBI Overtime Battlerama Jeo Ortiz defeats CJ Murdock via Decision – Fastest Escape in EBI Overtime Clayton Wimer defeats Derrick Adkins via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Final Jeo Ortiz defeats Clayton Wimer via Submission – Heel Hook Princess of the PGF Tournament Hazel Cenidoza defeats Jemma Gonzalez via Submission – Armbar Violet Goodnight defeats Gemma Salinas via Submission – Armbar Final Violet Goodnight defeats Hazel Cenidoza via Submission – Rear-naked Choke in EBI Overtime The full replay of the PGF World Season 9 Playoffs Final, including all of the above results, is available to watch on the promotion’s official YouTube channel: Tags: Austin OrandayElijah CarltonJett ThompsonKevin BeuhringProfessional Grappling Federation
